title: Estrogen Exclusive Thigh Highs Recipes
description: Adds recipes to the loot-only thigh high from the Estrogen mod
body:
Adds my own idea of crafting recipes for the loot-only pride thigh highs from Estrogen to make them available to everyone by choice!

The recipes were inspired by the already existing dying recipes but made more dye expensive to accomate the color variety and the fact that these thigh highs are supposed to be rarer. 

Here are some of them pictured:

![Pride, Trans, & Poly thigh high crafting recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ef14b8fb5908fcb2aefabf5861ea2723296ffc5.png)

If you need help or find any issues my Discord is tsubameuwu!
